MINI MINUTES: RE: PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER XUE'S DEMURRER to ANSWER to COMPLAINT.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. Off calendar per moving party's failure to provide courtesy copies in compliance with Local Rule 2.7B. In addition, there is no proof of service of the demurrer.
